title: Mexican mothers join search for Nancy Guthrie
author: Ryan Mancini
fullText: Mexican mothers with experience searching for missing people are helping Arizona and federal authorities amid their search for NBC “Today” host Savannah Guthrie’s mother. The Madres Buscadoras de Sonora — Spanish for Searching Mothers of Sonora — has distrubuted photos of Nancy Guthrie on social media as part of its search for the missing mother.…
